---

invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---

```

| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+

```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

Schema requirements came from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md and migration behavior from 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md + migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md. Both target files were read then updated accordingly, and inbox cleanup was required by process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
